issue_summary: Removed "throws ArithmeticException" from the signature of FieldElement<T>.divide(T), as this contract was too restrictive, and indeed broken by nearly all implementations of FieldElement<T>. See .
javadoc_before:
/** Compute this ÷ a.
     * @param a element to add
     * @return a new element representing this ÷ a
     * @exception ArithmeticException if a is the zero of the
     * additive operation (i.e. additive identity)
     */
javadoc_after:
